optionPoolId.description: The identifier of the option pool.

shareClassId.description: The identifier of the share class used by the option pool to issue equity.

fullyDilutedShares.description: Total common shares of an option pool if all outstanding grants and available equity in the option pool were exercised.

outstandingEquityAwardDerivatives.description:
Outstanding equity award derivatives. This includes:
 - Option Grants
 - Restricted Stock Units (RSU)
 - Stock Appreciation Rights (SAR)
 - Cash Bonus Unit (CBU)
 - International equity awards
outstandingEquityAwardDerivatives.title:
Outstanding equity award derivatives. This includes:
Option Grants
Restricted Stock Units (RSU)
Stock Appreciation Rights (SAR)
Cash Bonus Unit (CBU)
International equity awards

outstandingCommittedRestrictedStockAward.description: Board approved but unissued Restricted Stock Awards (RSAs).

name.description: The name of the option pool.

authorizedShares.description: The amount of shares authorized to be issued from the option pool.

terminatedDatetime.description: The timestamp when the option pool was terminated.
